title: Dream Calibration (T3↔T4 self-correction state)
description: Per-basin T3 baseline calibration state written by `update_calibration_from_demotions` (dream Phase 6d) and read by `run_promotion_pass` (Phase 6b). Closes the recursion edge of the 4-tier gate: when T4 keeps demoting moves a basin's T3 chose to promote, T3's bar for that basin gets raised; when T4 sustains them, the bar can relax. Lives at `~/.trinity/dream_calibration.json`. Single document keyed by basin id; rewritten in place each pass.

version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Increments when the basin-level shape changes.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (seconds precision) of the most recent calibration write. Best-effort: set by `_save_calibration`. Useful for analytics — how stale is the current calibration relative to recent demotions?

per_basin.description: Map from basin id (string, matches topics.json keys) to per-basin calibration state. Basins with fewer than _CALIBRATION_MIN_OBSERVATIONS promote+demote events are absent — `calibrated_baseline_for_basin` returns None and T3 uses its disk default.

elevated_baseline.description: Calibrated T3 baseline floor for this basin. `run_promotion_pass` passes this as the gate's `baseline` arg so T3's threshold is `max(disk_default, elevated_baseline)`. Clamped to [0.50, 0.90] — never relaxes below T3's safety floor and never escalates so high that nothing can promote.

prior_baseline.description: The elevated_baseline value before this calibration pass. Together with `last_action` lets analytics see the trajectory: prior 0.55 → new 0.65 with action `elevated` means the basin's T3 bar moved up by one step this cycle.

promoted_active.description: Count of currently-active moves anchored to this basin at calibration time. Read from `store.list_moves(archived=False)`.

promoted_archived.description: Count of archived (demoted) moves anchored to this basin at calibration time. Read from `store.list_moves(archived=True)`.

demotion_rate.description: promoted_archived / (promoted_active + promoted_archived). The signal the calibration update consumes: ≥0.50 elevates the baseline; ≤0.20 (with ≥5 observations) relaxes it; in-between leaves the basin out of the rewrite.

last_action.description: What happened in the most recent pass that touched this basin. `elevated` = baseline raised by 0.10 (or capped at 0.90); `relaxed` = lowered by 0.05 (or floored at 0.50); `stable` = unchanged (basins with `stable` action are skipped to avoid pointless rewrites).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp (seconds precision) of the calibration pass that last touched this basin. Per-basin granularity — separate from the doc-level updated_at.
